meaning: adj.最大限度利用能源的,以最少结构提供最大强度的
examples: Fuller explained the word dymaxion as a method of doing more with less.
Fuller's prefabricated Dymaxion House of the late twenties (also called "the four dimensional living machine") dates back to the grandparents of the countercultural generation.
To skeptics, Attia's Roundhouse evokes Buckminster Fuller's Dymaxion House of the 1940s.
